description_long: This is a rectangular, upright grocery bag with a black background adorned with a vibrant polka dot pattern in red, yellow, blue, and green. The front and back faces prominently display the brand name 'Renova' in bold white letters, centered within a horizontal band of denser dots. The bag features two white loop handles attached to the top, suggesting it is designed for easy carrying by hand. The side panels are narrower and continue the dotted pattern vertically, without any branding. The bag appears to be made of glossy coated paper or lightweight cardboard, with a hollow interior and no visible contents, indicating it is empty.
description: A black grocery bag with colorful polka dots, white 'Renova' branding, and white loop handles. The bag is upright, glossy, and appears empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Renova' logo centered on a black background with dense, colorful polka dots and two white loop handles at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag with vertical rows of polka dots and no visible branding; handles are seen from the side.
description_view_2: Back view identical to the front, with the 'Renova' logo and colorful polka dot pattern, plus white loop handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with vertical polka dots and no branding, handles visible from the side.
attribute_branding_or_logo: White 'Renova' logo centered on both front and back faces, surrounded by colorful polka dots.
